boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the public-sector operator execute the citizen-record or casework action now? Focus: license compliance stale proof.

final_answer: Action cannot proceed. The controlling control record says the required dependency is not closed, and the exact boundary remains open. The policy requires current source records to close execution authority before any citizen-record or casework action. Per source evidence, this is an escalation case, not an allow case.
